title: Block Tower Measure
description: A measuring game where kids stack block towers from biggest to smallest and compare heights.
learningGoals: Order blocks by size from biggest to smallest
Build vertical stacks with one-to-one placement
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap blocks into tower ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct blocks pop, sparkle, and speak their placement; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished towers are counted or compared aloud.

modes.title: Stack It Tall
modes.skill: size ordering and counting tower height

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder block art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
